ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "low_temperature" REAL /* Low temperature for the day */,
  "high_temperature" REAL /* High temperature for the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the day (in inches) */,
  "snow_fall" REAL /* Total snow fall for the day (in inches) */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth at the end of the day (in inches) */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed for the day (in mph) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the day (in mph) */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Percentage of cloud cover (0-100%) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Overall weather conditions (e.g., Clear, Overcast, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather conditions */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the weather record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "weather_station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station (in meters) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for routine maintenance */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensors used in the weather station */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather condition (e.g., clear, cloudy, precipitation) */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather forecast */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecasted temperature for the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Forecasted precipitation for the day (in inches) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed for the day (in mph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the alert is made */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather alert (e.g., storm, flood, heat wave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
